sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85333" key="polu/smhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-σμηνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85333.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in many swarms,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μέλισσαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1263.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choeril.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
